An attacker can bypass IPv6 subnet rules due to an incorrect masking operation in IpSubnetFilterRule.compareTo(). Valid public IP addresses can bypass the restrictions.

### Details
`io.netty.handler.ipfilter.IpSubnetFilterRule#compareTo(java.net.InetSocketAddress)` method performs a bitwise AND between the incoming IP address and the configured networkAddress, instead of the subnetMask.

### Impact
Access Control Bypass. Attacker can bypass IpSubnetFilter IPv6 access controls.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00573, "percentile": 0.43515}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3qp7-7mw8-wx86", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T19:00:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qp7-7mw8-wx86", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3qp7-7mw8-wx86"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44249"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-11T22:16:56Z", "published_at": "2026-06-08T19:00:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty/security/advisories/GHSA-3qp7-7mw8-wx86", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.1.135.Final", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.2.15.Final", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44249", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qp7-7mw8-wx86"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty/security-advisories/GHSA-3qp7-7mw8-wx86", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty", "summary": "Netty has an IPv6 Subnet Filter Bypass via Incorrect Comparator Masking", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:27:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3qp7-7mw8-wx86", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.15.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-handler"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.2.0.Final, <= 4.2.14.Final"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.135.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-handler"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.134.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Netty has an IPv6 Subnet Filter Bypass via Incorrect Comparator Masking
